premise: Two rival restaurateurs in a small coastal town are forced to share a kitchen after a storm destroys one of their restaurants. The insurance won't pay out for three months.

characters.name: Nadia
characters.description: Runs a modern fusion restaurant. Controlled, ambitious, recently divorced. Cooks like she's proving something to someone who isn't watching anymore.

characters.name: Jem
characters.description: Runs the traditional seafood place next door. Loud, instinctive, terrible with money. His regulars are family. Has never left the town.

characters.name: Vera
characters.description: A property developer who wants to buy both lots. Patient, polite, always has a better offer ready. The storm was convenient for her.
